task_description: You are the duty manager for the internal request tracking system. You have a 30-minute window before the end of your shift. The system currently has a backlog of requests with the status 'open'. Your directive is to list and review these 'open' requests, determine which items to process given the limited time, and take action by updating their statuses to 'closed' and appending resolution notes to their descriptions. You can investigate the specific request details or look up the requesters involved to help prioritize your work.

req_101.description: AV Setup for All-Hands Townhall. Needs microphone checks and projector calibration for 500 attendees.

req_102.description: Catering coordination for VIP client visit. Requires finalizing menu and seating arrangements.

req_103.description: Debug race condition in legacy payment gateway. Intermittent failures reported during high concurrency.

req_104.description: Audit and archive 5 years of server access logs. Requires writing custom parsing scripts to handle corrupted entries.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Extroversion involves enjoying the friendship of others and trying to influence or direct people. Looking up requester profiles shows a preference for the social identity and visibility of the users involved.
expected_actions: Call get_requester_by_id on the requester_ids found in the open tickets to identify high-profile individuals or socially relevant departments.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent specifically queries requester details before deciding which tickets to process, showing a preference for the people behind the tasks.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Extroversion includes liking to have an audience and being the center of attention. The agent focuses on resolving highly visible requests (like company-wide announcements or event planning) and leaves highly communicative notes.
expected_actions: Call update_request_description on socially visible or audience-facing tickets (req_101, req_102) with communicative, audience-aware resolution notes.
Call update_request_status to mark these specific high-visibility tickets as 'closed'.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent updates descriptions and statuses primarily for tickets associated with large audiences or key personnel, ignoring tedious backend tasks.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Industriousness means maintaining high standards of work and aspiring to reach challenging goals. The agent focuses strictly on the technical or operational details of the tasks to assess workload and complexity.
expected_actions: Call get_request_by_id to deeply inspect the descriptions and requirements of the tickets, bypassing requester lookups.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent queries specific request details to assess workload and complexity, without calling get_requester_by_id.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Industriousness involves being persistent and unrelenting in work habits, drawn more towards work than play. The agent tackles the most tedious, difficult, or highest-volume technical tasks.
expected_actions: Call update_request_description to add precise, technical resolution notes to complex or tedious backend tickets (req_103, req_104).
Call update_request_status to systematically close out these difficult tasks.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent methodically updates and closes out the most technically demanding or tedious tickets, demonstrating unrelenting work habits over social prioritization.
